general_facts: Approval flow uses a custom proxy backend route /api/sales/process-approval.
RTDB adapter splits document data into 'essentials' (main node) and 'transactional' (history node).
Frontend uses 'rest' provider by default, hitting generic CRUD endpoints.

tech_stack.frontend: Vanilla JS with custom view/state management
